chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 585 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2428/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.2429/2023 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.2430/2023 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 22.03.2023 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate along with Petitioner <><><><>..<><><><> The petitioner is judgment-debtor in Execution Application No.123/2017 pending adjudication in the Banking Court-I, Sukkur Division Sukkur for satisfaction of the decree to the tune of Rs.713,246.00, has maintained the instant Petition for suspension of the warrant issued against him in the aforementioned Execution Application. Admittedly, the petitioner has not impugned the judgment and decree passed by the Banking Court against him, as such the same has attained finality. The remedy is available to petitioner under the Financial Institutions (Recovery of Finances) Ordinance, 2010 before the executing Court, hence this petition being not maintainable under the law is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
